metadata.rationale: The article is built on a real news event and genuine evacuation reporting, but it misleadingly fuses separate strands of the regional crisis into one narrative around the Chinese death. It also uses a manipulated border-road image and a fully synthetic route map, while pairing unrelated museum and airport visuals with the fatality-and-evacuation storyline.
